geography.data_source: BBMP ward boundaries 2023 extended with BDA peripheral area notifications; includes villages absorbed under BBMP 2007 expansion

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 ward-level data for Bangalore Urban peripheral wards; household size from NSSO 78th Round rural-urban fringe category; literacy from Karnataka DISE 2021-22 for peri-urban taluks; SC/ST share from Census 2011 SC/ST tables Bangalore North taluk

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round PLFS for urban fringe Karnataka; median income estimated from MGNREGA wage data 2023 and NSSO consumer expenditure survey; informal rate from ILO India Employment Report 2024 for peri-urban zones

commute_profile.data_source: DULT Bengaluru Comprehensive Mobility Plan 2020 for peripheral zones; BMTC route network coverage map 2023; no metro stations within 5km radius; car ownership from RTO Bangalore Rural registration data 2023

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: fare_sensitivity high due to low incomes and bus dependency (NSSO 78th Round); loss_aversion high — limited financial buffer; diffusion_speed low due to lower digital penetration (TRAI rural broadband data 2023); political_mobilisation from Lokniti-CSDS Karnataka Assembly Election Study 2023 peri-urban turnout data

social_network_parameters.data_source: High clustering from village-origin social structures persisting in peri-urban areas; high avg_connections due to extended family and caste networks; low cross-income bridging due to occupational homogeneity; estimated from IHDS-II household social network module for Karnataka peri-urban

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from BBMP weekly market license records 2022; footfall averaged across market days (2 per week); employment includes temporary vendors and helpers
Estimated from BBMP street vendor survey 2022 for peripheral wards; transit dependency moderate — vendors travel from nearby villages by BMTC bus

data_source: Composite zone config built from Census 2011 (demographics), NSSO PLFS 78th Round (income/employment), DULT CMP 2020 (commute), BMTC 2023 (bus network), BBMP 2023 (ward boundaries), IHDS-II (social networks), MGNREGA wage records 2023
